## tscli set webhook test

Test webhook delivery

### Synopsis

Test webhook delivery by sending a test event for a single webhook.
This verifies the target endpoint is reachable and configured correctly.

```
tscli set webhook test [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help        help for test
      --id string   Webhook ID to test
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli set webhook](tscli_set_webhook.md)	 - Update or rotate a webhook
